description: Write and execute a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/tor_control.py to authenticate to the Tor Browser Control Port (127.0.0.1:9151) using the session's authentication cookie. The script must extract the Tor daemon version, save the response to /home/ga/Documents/tor_version.txt, and trigger a new routing identity. Verify the identity change by recording the exit IP address from https://check.torproject.org/ to /home/ga/Documents/ip_before.txt before execution and to /home/ga/Documents/ip_after.txt after the identity has been rotated.
